name: crawl4ai
description: This skill should be used when users need to scrape websites, extract structured data, handle JavaScript-heavy pages, crawl multiple URLs, or build automated web data pipelines. Includes optimized extraction patterns with schema generation for efficient, LLM-free extraction.
capabilities: Crawl single or multiple URLs with JavaScript support
Extract structured data using CSS selectors or LLM
Generate clean markdown output from web pages
Handle authenticated sessions and proxy configurations
Process dynamic content with configurable wait conditions
author: smallnest
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged 2290 issues but 99% are false positives from markdown documentation. Actual Python code shows legitimate web crawler functionality with user-controlled URLs, explicit credential configuration, and standard file output operations. No hidden data exfiltration or malicious patterns found.
valueStatement: Crawl4AI enables efficient web scraping with JavaScript support, schema-based extraction, and flexible output formats. Users can extract data without LLM calls for cost-effective automation or use LLM-powered extraction for complex content.
userTitle: Scrape websites and extract structured data
limitations: LLM extraction requires API keys and costs money
Rate limits and bot detection may affect some sites

useCases.title: Build data pipelines
useCases.description: Extract structured data from websites for analytics and reporting workflows.

useCases.title: Document websites
useCases.description: Convert documentation sites to markdown for offline reading or migration.

useCases.title: Aggregate web content
useCases.description: Collect and filter content from multiple sources for research analysis.

promptTemplates.title: Basic crawl
promptTemplates.prompt: Crawl this URL and return the main content as markdown: https://example.com

promptTemplates.title: Extract data
promptTemplates.prompt: Extract product names, prices, and links from this e-commerce page using CSS selectors.

promptTemplates.title: Handle JavaScript
promptTemplates.prompt: Crawl this JavaScript-heavy page and wait for the dynamic content to load before extracting.

promptTemplates.title: Batch processing
promptTemplates.prompt: Crawl these three URLs in parallel and extract the main headlines from each: https://news1.com, https://news2.com, https://news3.com

bestPractices: Use schema-based CSS extraction for repetitive sites to avoid LLM costs
Set appropriate timeouts and wait conditions for JavaScript-heavy pages
Respect rate limits and use caching during development to reduce load
antiPatterns: Using LLM extraction when CSS selectors would work (higher cost)
Crawling without proper timeout settings (may hang indefinitely)
Ignoring rate limits on target sites (may get blocked)

faq.question: What is crawl4ai?
faq.answer: A web crawling and data extraction library with CLI and Python SDK support.

faq.question: Do I need to install anything?
faq.answer: Yes, run: pip install crawl4ai and crawl4ai-setup

faq.question: Can I extract data without LLM?
faq.answer: Yes, use CSS selector-based extraction which is faster and free.

faq.question: Does it handle JavaScript pages?
faq.answer: Yes, it uses a browser and can wait for dynamic content.

faq.question: What output formats supported?
faq.answer: Markdown, JSON, HTML, and extracted structured data.

faq.question: How to handle authentication?
faq.answer: Configure session_id and provide credentials in browser config.
